title: chocolate++
description: fork of raspberry+ red with tons more stuff and might work
body:
this is a fork of my mod raspberry+ varient: red that adds mods to it like all of the macaws mods, all of the truly modular mods
it has been tested and works 
this is a bit larger then my raspberry+ madpack if you dont want a vanila plus and want a little bit more then use this pack instead
__________________________________________________________________________________________
please credit or link this modpack if you want to fork it and publish it plublicly
__________________________________________________________________________________________
once again do not enable any "optinal" mods, it most likly will not work
__________________________________________________________________________________________
i might even add a fork for the blue varient if i can get it to run on devices other than mine
__________________________________________________________________________________________
also includes: mods like; immersive aircraft(with some addons), the rasperry+ modset, distant horizens, and many more 
__________________________________________________________________________________________
i recomend adding the cool rain mod to the pack
__________________________________________________________________________________________
- should work for others
- decently optimized
- small (ish)
- under 200 mods
- might get updates often
- fun with freinds (if it doesnt crash)
- modular tools and armor from truly modular mods
- aircrafts from immersive aircraft
- seasons 
- more biomes from oh the biomes we go and others
- funiture from the Macaws mods
- immersive sounds from sounds physics remastered and ambent sounds 
- wakes (from wakes)
- and more
__________________________________________________________________________________________
check out my other modpacks 
[raspberry+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/raspberry+) I recomend using raspberry+ or the ++ vertion (use whatever one works for you) or try: [NeoFox](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neoneoneo-re)
